## Project Overview
- **Project Name**: EditLine Productions
- **Type**: Professional website for video, audio, photo and line editing services
- **Tech Stack**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (static website)
- **Features**: Landing page, services showcase, pricing, portfolio, and contact form
